title: potentilla douglasii var. douglasii
intro: Potentilla douglasii var. douglasii, also known as Douglas' cinquefoil or five-fingered cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant's health benefits include relieving symptoms of diarrhea, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Douglas' cinquefoil can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for various herbal applications.
